5.11.191.en: Added 28 new device fingerprints, including Nedis SmartLife Radiator Control. Expanded compatibility across switch, sensor, and climate drivers.

5.11.190.en: Added 27 new device fingerprints and low-battery alerts for 113 devices. Fixed SDK v3 flow crashes, restored missing battery capabilities, added time sync for 13 thermostats, and fixed missing capabilities in 10 remote drivers.

5.11.189.en: Added 27 new device fingerprints including Nedis SmartLife Radiator. Fixed SDK v3 flow card crashes, resolved alarm_battery capability conflicts, and restored battery reporting. Added time sync for 13 TRV drivers and fixed missing capabilities in 10 remote drivers.

5.11.188.en: Community sync: 27 new fingerprints added from Z2M/ZHA/forum/JohanBendz. Minor and forum improvements. Total: .

5.11.186.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.186 adds 681 new fingerprints and updates 193 drivers.
